title: christella clivalis
intro: Christella clivalis, also known as the clivalis fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. Christella clivalis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system.
